title: Unexpected Significant Performance Degradation on Movement of Code

features.name: event_control_on_non_clock_signal
features.description: Code should include an always block with event control on a non-clock signal like @(posedge Validate) instead of @(posedge clk)
features.snippet:
always @(posedge Validate) begin
  if(Validate) begin
    count_validate = count_validate + 1;
  end
end

features.name: system_functions_in_always_block
features.description: Code should include system functions like $fopen, $fclose, $fdisplayh, $display inside an always block with conditional execution

features.name: conditional_guard_in_clocked_process
features.description: Code should include an if statement guard inside an always @(posedge clk) block for conditional execution
